  1. Home
  2. Wireless Business Plans

 Questions? Call sales at 877-887-6809       

Explore our Business Performance phone plans.

Including the new SuperMobile cell phone plan.

From reliable connectivity to intelligent network performance built to supercharge your business, our plans deliver what matters—flexibility, security, and even seamless satellite coverage.

Lower costs. Better coverage. Built for business.​

For a limited time, switch to T-Mobile for Business and save $10/month per line on SuperMobile, with savings available on every eligible line.

$10/mo. credit/line for 2+ lines, $15/mo. credit/line for single line customers.​ If a single line customer adds a 2nd line at a future date during the promotion, the $15 credit on line 1 will end and both lines will receive $10/line credit​.

How many lines does your business need?

plans table comparison
A new page will load if 13 or more is chosen, opens in a new window
Feature Name

5 Year Price Guarantee: Applies to monthly price for on-network talk, text, and 5G data. Exclusions like taxes & fees apply. With Autopay, plus taxes & fees. During congestion, customers on CoreMobile using >100GB and on ProMobile using >200GB/mo. may notice reduced speeds until next bill cycle due to data prioritization. Activate up to HD streaming (CoreMobile) or up to 4K UHD streaming (ProMobile/SuperMobile) on capable device, or video typically streams in SD. Up to 300GB high-speed tethering then unlimited on our network at max 3G speeds. Best Mobile Network: Based on analysis by Ookla of Speedtest Intelligence® data 2H 2025. Ookla trademarks used under license and reprinted with permission. Satellite Coverage: With compatible device in most outdoor areas in the U.S. where you can see the sky. 

Discover SuperMobile, our best business plan on the Best Network.

SuperMobile—the first and only business plan to combine intelligent performance, built-in security, and seamless satellite coverage to give you the competitive edge. Includes a 5-year price guarantee.

Intelligent performance.

The first-ever nationwide network slice built for business. Power productivity with low latency, fast 5G speeds, and intelligent connectivity that adapts to your needs in real-time by allocating network resources when and where they’re needed.

Enhanced security.

Built-in security on America's Best Network. Rest easy knowing Threat Protect keeps mobile devices secure across every app, even on public Wi-Fi networks.

Seamless coverage.

Access the largest satellite-to-mobile network with T-Satellite. Work on the go, with the only satellite-to-mobile network in the U.S. that automatically connects to capable smartphones. T-Satellite supports more than 100 types of devices and delivers coverage from over 650 satellites.

Best business plan based on combination of advanced network performance, coverage layers, and security features. Best Network based on analysis by Ookla® of Speedtest Intelligence® 1H 2025. Ookla trademarks used under license and reprinted with permission.

Get started

Switch to the largest 5G network today.

We’ll help ensure you have a seamless experience and no disruption to your coverage with a personalized onboarding plan and dedicated implementation team.

Get details

Get more 5G bars in more places—and ditch the map that’s mostly gaps.

Use the slider below to see how our coverage compares to the competition.

Verizon
Verizon's 5G Coverage
AT&T
AT&T's 5G Coverage
T-Mobile
T-Mobile's 5G Coverage

T-Mobile has America's largest 5G network. Capable device required. Some uses may require certain plan or feature; see T-Mobile.com.

Business cell phone plan comparison: See how much you can save when you switch vs. Verizon and AT&T.

Compare your business cellular plan
MORE PLAN OPTIONS

Options to meet your unique business needs.

DEVICE MANAGEMENT

Introducing Business All-In.

A unified solution for businesses that bundles connectivity, device management, security, and protection. Save 20% with Business All-In. Limited time offer ends July 8.

Get details
With AutoPay; plus taxes and fees. Pricing includes $10/mo. discount via monthly bill credit on SuperMobile plan & additional bundle discount savings. 20% savings vs. the regular rate, non-bundled pricing for the included products. Certain exclusions apply. Sample terms & conditions.

20 lines, $20,000 savings.

Save $1,000 per line—that’s $20,000 when you add 20 lines, and even more when you add more lines. Your business is limitless. Your savings should be, too.

With 36 monthly bill credits for new accounts that add at least 20 lines on SuperMobile.

Things change—your internet rate won’t. 

Save big and get 5G Business Internet with a 5-year price guarantee for just $50/mo. with an eligible voice line.

Learn more
Plus taxes & fees. Price Guarantee exclusions like taxes and fees apply.

Get $600 for every line you switch.

When you bring your own eligible device or buy a new one at full price, you’ll get $600 for every line that you switch to America’s largest 5G network.

Get Started
Via 20 monthly bill credits.

Data plans for your connected devices.

Get seamless connectivity, international data and texting, and fast, reliable service on our 5G network—with no annual contracts—on our Unlimited Data Plans.

Learn more
During congestion, heavy data users (>50GB/mo. for most plans) and customers choosing lower-prioritized plans may notice lower speeds than other customers; see plan for details. Video typically streams on smartphone/tablet in SD quality. 5G: Capable device req'd; coverage not available in some areas. Some uses may require certain plan or feature; see T-Mobile.com.

International Data Passes.

Stay connected on international business trips with more data and unlimited talk and text in 215+ countries and destinations.

Learn more
High-speed data up to allotment, then unlimited at max 256 Kbps speeds; see plans for details.

Enterprise Unlimited Plans.

Get our Enterprise Unlimited Plans for the price you’d pay for pooled plans from AT&T and Verizon.

Learn more

Experience for Business​ w/ Military Savings Plans​.

Our signature plans at an exclusive discount for veteran-owned businesses.

Learn more

Experience for Business​ w/ First Responder Savings​ Plans.

Our latest plans exclusively for first responder-owned small businesses.

Learn more

First Responder Agency.

We're empowering those on the front line with FREE nationwide 5G network access.

Learn more

T-Mobile for Business Plans FAQ

  • Our new Business Performance Plans come with all the same great value as our Business Unlimited portfolio, and so much more! The new SuperMobile plans come with a 5-year price guarantee, incremental hotspot, as well as T-Satellite, network slicing and Threat Protect built in. You will get the same great international benefits while traveling internationally and in Canada and Mexico. Learn more about SuperMobile here.

  • T-Mobile's business phone plans are structured so that the monthly price per phone line decreases as more phone lines are added (up to the first 5 or 6 phone lines, depending on the selected plan).

    If you activate a new account with at least 3 voice lines, you qualify for a free or discounted voice line. SuperMobile, ProMobile, CoreMobile, Business Unlimited Ultimate+, Experience More for Business and Experience Beyond for Business phone plans are all eligible for 3rd line FREE.

  • A business can purchase up to 12 lines when buying online. If you need more than 12, please contact a T-Mobile for Business expert.

  • It's up to you. With T-Mobile business phone plans, you can choose to bring your own devices (BYOD) or purchase new ones. If you already have compatible devices you like, your team can keep them, along with their phone numbers and data, and simply activate the devices on a business plan. Prefer new devices? T-Mobile offers a wide range of options for your business.

  • T-Mobile has moved away from traditional long-term contracts for postpaid plans. Instead, we have adopted a more flexible approach known as "no-contract" or "contract-free" plans. This shift was part of T-Mobile's "Un-carrier" initiative to eliminate restrictive contracts and offer greater flexibility to customers.

  • Yes, T-Mobile offers a choice of plans with unlimited data so you can connect seamlessly across devices, including tablets, hotspots, laptops, wearables, and business internet. Each of the plans on our 5G network offer different solutions for small businesses that need reliable connectivity while on the go. Learn more here.

  • It depends on which plan you choose. Our Experience for Business plans start at $40 per phone line for 5 lines with Autopay and 3rd line free discount. Learn more about Experience for Business plans here.

  • Enterprise and government customers can find more information about our Enterprise Unlimited plans here.

    Veteran-owned businesses can find more information about our Experience for Business w/ Military Savings plan here.

    First responder-owned small businesses can find more information about our Experience for Business w/ First Responder Savings plan here.

  • Head to our phone shop to find new devices that best fit your business needs. Also, check out our business deals for some of our best offers.

Got questions about 3rd line FREE offer?

  • New business mobile customers activating on an eligible voice plan, including SuperMobile, ProMobile, CoreMobile, Business Unlimited Ultimate+, Experience More for Business and Experience Beyond for Business plan (lines 1-12), can get a free voice line when they have 2 paid voice lines.

  • The following business cell phone plans are eligible: SuperMobie, ProMobile, CoreMobile, Business Unlimited Ultimate+, Experience More for Business and Experience Beyond for Business plan (lines 1-12).

  • You can keep the promotional pricing as long as you maintain an eligible business cell phone plan.

  • To qualify for a free or discounted voice line, you must:

    • Activate a new account with at least 3 voice lines on an eligible rate plan.
      • 3rd Line Free: SuperMobile, ProMobile, CoreMobile, Business Unlimited Ultimate+, Experience More for Business and Experience Beyond for Business.
    • The bill credit will be applied monthly to the eligible line.
    • Customers on business cellular plans with additional taxes and fees will receive credits for the monthly service price of their line but will be responsible for all applicable taxes and fees.
    • Your new lines must remain active to continue receiving bill credits.
    • A maximum of 1 free or discounted line may be added per account for this promotion.
    •  You can keep the promotional pricing as long as you maintain an eligible rate plan.

  • Your free or discounted line must be a voice line. Other line types are not eligible for this promotion.

  • This offer has a maximum of one free or discounted voice line per account.

  • You’re not required to use AutoPay, but you’ll get a monthly discount on select business mobile plans if you sign up for AutoPay with an eligible payment method.

    AutoPay is not required to receive the promotion.

  • In most cases, you’ll see your promotional credits on your first bill.

  • Yes, you may combine this offer with most other promotions, including device promotions. Talk to us to ensure you meet the requirements for both promotions. This promotion cannot be combined with other free or discounted voice line offers.

  • No, this promotion is only available with qualifying regular-rate voice plans.

T-Mobile for Business Plan Benefits FAQ

  • Premium data is simply the cellular data that gets higher priority on the network. For example, if the network is busy and you have remaining premium data on your account—you may experience faster speeds than those who don’t. Once you’ve used up your monthly allotment of premium data, you may be prioritized lower than other customers and may notice lower speeds in times and places with network congestion.

  • If your T-Mobile business plan has unlimited premium data, it means that your data won't be slowed down regardless of how much of it you use. The following business plans offer unlimited premium data: SuperMobile, Experience More for Business, Experience Beyond for Business.

  • Yes, all business plans include unlimited talk and text, and unlimited 5G and 4G LTE data on our network, ensuring seamless communication for your team.

  • SuperMobile and Experience Beyond for Business plans include 300 GB high-speed hotspot data per line. ProMobile includes 200 GB high-speed hotspot data per line. Experience More for Business plan includes 100 GB high-speed mobile hotspot data per line. CoreMobile includes 50 GB high-speed mobile hotspot data per line.

  • Yes, when you want to add extra data to your hotspot, you can purchase additional data and upgrade only the lines you need. Please contact T-Mobile for Business for more information here.

  • T-Mobile talk and text includes unlimited domestic calls and texts. Plus, you'll get unlimited calling and texting in Canada, and Mexico and unlimited texting in up to 215+ countries and destinations.

  • Scam Shield is a collection of services offered by T-Mobile to detect, block, and protect you from robocalls and spam.

    ProMobile and CoreMobile features Scam Block, advanced Caller ID, scam reporting, and more to help protect your mobile privacy.

    Included with SuperMobile, Experience More for Business and Experience Beyond for Business is Scam Shield Premium which features all the above plus voicemail to text, reverse number lookup, call categories, and more.

  • Threat Protect provides always-on, industry-leading security to help protect your business and reduce exposure to threats across any network and every app on your device.

Let’s get started.
866-624-0807
Contact us
Find a store
Shop now

Via one-time bill credit. Limited-time; subject to change. Qualifying credit, new line, business account, and eligible service ($70/mo. w/AutoPay) required. Must purchase a new device on an Equipment Installment Plan; not eligible with device promotional offers. Restore lines canceled in past 90 days before adding qualifying line. Line with promo must be active and in good standing to receive bill credit; allow 3-4 ill cycles from fulfillment of offer requirements. May not be combined with some offers or discounts.

5 year guarantee means we won’t change the price of talk, text, and 5G smartphone data on our network for at least 5 years as long as you are on an eligible plan. Guarantee also applies to price for data on wearable/tablet/mobile internet lines added to your plan. Your guarantee starts when you activate or switch to an eligible plan and doesn’t restart if you add a line or change plans after that. Taxes & fees, per-use charges, plan add-ons, third-party services, and network management practices aren’t included. CoreMobile: Limited-time, subject to change. $35 device connection charge due at sale. Credit approval & deposit may be required. Regulatory Programs & Telco Recovery Fees totaling up to $4.49 per line, and federal and local surcharges apply. See Broadband Facts at T-Mobile.com. Capable device required for some features. Not combinable with certain offers. Switching plans may cause you to lose current plan/feature benefits; ask a rep for details. Plan not available for hotspots and some other data-first devices. Unlimited talk & text features for direct communications between 2 people; others (e.g., conference & chat lines, etc.) may cost extra. Some messages, including those over 1MB, use data and may be unavailable internationally. Unlimited U.S. roaming. High-speed data is US only. Not available for hotspots and some other data-first devices. Activation required to deliver video streams at speeds that provide up to HD video capability; some content providers may not stream their services in HD. May affect speed of video downloads; does not apply to video uploads. Tethering 5GB high-speed data then unlimited on our network at max 3G speeds. For customers using >50GB/mo., primary data usage must be on smartphone or tablet. Smartphone/tablet usage is prioritized over Mobile Hotspot (tethering) usage, which may result in higher speeds for data used on smartphones and tablets. AutoPay Pricing for lines 1-5, max discount of $25. AutoPay discount requires bank account or debit card, otherwise $5 more/line/mo. May not be reflected on first bill. Int’l Roaming: Calls, including over Wi-Fi, are $.20/min. (no charge for Wi-Fi calls to US, Mexico and Canada); customers on consumer plans (e.g., some sole proprietors) pay an additional $.05/min. In Canada/Mexico, up to 5GB high-speed data then unlimited at up to 128kbps. Up to 5GB high-speed data in select Central European countries; otherwise standard speeds approx. 256 Kbps. Not for extended international use; you must reside in the U.S. and primary usage must occur on our network. Device must register on our network before international use. Service may be terminated or restricted for excessive roaming. Coverage not available in some areas; we are not responsible for our partners’ networks. Scam Shield: Capable device req’d. Turning on Scam Block might block calls you want; disable any time. ProMobile: Limited-time, subject to change. $35 device connection charge due at sale. Credit approval & deposit may be required. Regulatory Programs & Telco Recovery Fees totaling up to $4.49 per line, and federal and local surcharges apply. See Broadband Facts at T-Mobile.com. Unlimited U.S. roaming. Unlimited high-speed data US only. Not available for hotspots and some other data-first devices. Capable device required for some features. Activation required to deliver video streams at speeds that provide up to Ultra HD video capability (max 4K); some content providers may not stream their services in UHD. May affect speed of video downloads; does not apply to video uploads. Tethering: 200GB high-speed data then unlimited on our network at max 3G speeds. Service may be terminated or restricted for excessive roaming. For customers using >50GB/mo., primary data usage must be on smartphone or tablet. Smartphone and tablet usage is prioritized over Mobile Hotspot Service (tethering) usage, which may result in higher speeds for data used on smartphones and tablets. Int’l Roaming: Calls, including over Wi-Fi, are $.20/min. (no charge for Wi-Fi calls to US, Mexico and Canada); customers on consumer plans (e.g., some sole proprietors) pay an additional $.05/min. In Canada/Mexico, up to 5GB high-speed data then unlimited at up to 128kbps. Up to 5GB high-speed data in select Central European countries; otherwise standard speeds approx. 256 Kbps. Not for extended international use; you must reside in the U.S. and primary usage must occur on our network. Device must register on our network before international use. Service may be terminated or restricted for excessive roaming. Coverage not available in some areas; we are not responsible for our partners’ networks. Threat Protect: Capable device req’d. Turning on Scam Block might block calls you want; disable any time. In-Flight Connection: In-Flight Wi-Fi sponsored by T-Mobile via customer loyalty programs on Alaska, Delta, Hawaiian, and Southwest airlines. Scam Shield: Capable device req’d. Turning on Scam Block might block calls you want; disable any time. Threat Protect: Capable device, app download, and subscription (included with plan) required. SuperMobile: Limited-time, subject to change. $35 device connection charge due at sale. Credit approval & deposit may be required. Regulatory Programs & Telco Recovery Fees totaling up to $4.49 per line, and federal and local surcharges apply. See Broadband Facts at T-Mobile.com. Unlimited U.S. roaming. Unlimited high-speed data US only. Not available for hotspots and some other data-first devices. Capable device required for some features. Activation required to deliver video streams at speeds that provide up to Ultra HD video capability (max 4K); some content providers may not stream their services in UHD. May affect speed of video downloads; does not apply to video uploads. Tethering: 300GB high-speed data then unlimited on our network at max 3G speeds. Service may be terminated or restricted for excessive roaming. For customers using >50GB/mo., primary data usage must be on smartphone or tablet. Smartphone and tablet usage is prioritized over Mobile Hotspot Service (tethering) usage, which may result in higher speeds for data used on smartphones and tablets. Int’l Roaming: Calls, including over Wi-Fi, are $.20/min. (no charge for Wi-Fi calls to US, Mexico and Canada); customers on consumer plans (e.g., some sole proprietors) pay an additional $.05/min. In Canada/Mexico, up to 5GB high-speed data then unlimited at up to 256kbps. In 215+ countries and destinations, up to 5GB high-speed data, then unlimited at up to 256Kbps. Not for extended international use; you must reside in the U.S. and primary usage must occur on our network. Device must register on our network before international use. Service may be terminated or restricted for excessive roaming. Coverage not available in some areas; we are not responsible for our partners’ networks. Scam Shield: Capable device req’d. Turning on Scam Block might block calls you want; disable any time. Threat Protect: Capable device, app download, and subscription (included with plan) required. Slice: Features available on our 5G standalone network; not available while roaming, via satellite, or while tethering. Slice features (data prioritization and latency optimization) available in areas of Ultra Capacity 5G coverage with capable device and 5G Standalone settings. Coverage not available in some areas. T-Satellite: Texting & select satellite optimized apps available with compatible device in most outdoor areas where you can see the sky. Satellite service, including 911, may be delayed, limited, or unavailable. In-Flight Connection: In-Flight Wi-Fi sponsored by T-Mobile via customer loyalty programs on Alaska, Delta, Hawaiian, and Southwest airlines. Network Management: Service may be slowed, suspended, terminated, or restricted for misuse, abnormal use, interference with our network or ability to provide quality service to other users, or significant roaming. On-device usage is prioritized over tethering usage, which may result in higher speeds for data used on device. See T-Mobile.com/OpenInternet for details. See Terms and Conditions (including arbitration provision) at www.T-Mobile.com for additional information.
